message.content:
- Enduro3 is India's first and only adventure race 
- It is organized by the National Education Foundation (NEF) based in Pune 
- The race has been attracting increasing participation across varied age groups since its inception in 2003 
- There are different categories including Open, IT, Corporate, Amateur, Collegian, Junior, 40+, Doctors, Media, Teachers, and Family 
- Each category is further divided into Mixed and All Female teams with each team comprising 3 members and at least one female member 
- Activities include trekking, cycling, river crossing, rappelling, paddling, navigation, and kayaking
